name: Spicy Sweet Potato Won Tons
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake potatoes in a 375°F oven for 1 hour, or until very soft.
2. Cut the potatoes in half and scrape the flesh into a bowl (about 2 cups).
3. Add ginger, cilantro, chiles, and salt; mix well.
4. Place 1 tablespoon of filling in a wonton wrapper.
5. Brush a little water around the rim of the wrapper.
6. Fold the wrapper in half to form a half-moon shape.
7. Press the edges together to seal.
8. Set aside on waxed paper and cover with a damp towel.
9. Repeat until all the wontons are filled.
10. Pour oil into a wok; heat over medium-high until it sizzles when a drop of water is added.
11. Reduce heat to medium, using tongs to slip a few wontons at a time into the oil.
12. Fry for 1 minute, or until golden and slightly puffed.
13. Turn and fry for an additional 30-40 seconds.
14. Remove with paper towels to drain.
15. Repeat with remaining wontons.
16. Serve hot.
Serves 8 as an appetizer.
